description: Calendly Personal Access Tokens (JWT-shaped), OAuth, V2 webhook signature, and calendar / external-invitee red flags.

misconfigurations.title: Calendly V2 webhook handler does not verify `Calendly-Webhook-Signature`
misconfigurations.rationale: V2 signs payload+timestamp with HMAC-SHA256 under the webhook signing key. Skipping verification lets attackers spoof booking events into your CRM/Slack.
misconfigurations.fix: Validate signature `t=...,v1=...` per the docs; reject if timestamp drift > 3 min.

misconfigurations.title: Personal Access Token used as the credential for an org-wide integration
misconfigurations.rationale: PATs are user-bound. When the user leaves or rotates their PAT, the integration breaks, and the PAT inherits the user's organization role.
misconfigurations.fix: Use OAuth 2.0 with a Calendly Connected App tied to the organization, not a PAT.

misconfigurations.title: Routing form configured to collect non-essential PII (DOB, SSN, gov-ID) in 'Custom Questions'
misconfigurations.rationale: Calendly stores answers in the meeting record; PII collected this way bypasses your CRM PII controls.
misconfigurations.fix: Reduce custom questions to the minimum; collect any restricted PII inside the authenticated app flow instead.

misconfigurations.title: SSO configured but password-based login still allowed for admins
misconfigurations.fix: Admin Center > Security > require SSO for all users; disable password fallback for admins.

admin_red_flags.title: Bulk invitee export via API by an unexpected principal
admin_red_flags.rationale: Invitee lists include emails, names, optionally phone — phishing seed material.
admin_red_flags.signal: API gateway / WAF log: `GET /scheduled_events/*/invitees` with paginated total > 5k by non-RevOps principal.

admin_red_flags.title: Internal event type made public-link
admin_red_flags.rationale: Sales / interview links accidentally exposed for unauthenticated booking.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: event_type visibility changed to 'public' on URLs containing 'interview', 'security', 'finance'.

admin_red_flags.title: Webhook subscription target URL changed to an external domain
admin_red_flags.rationale: ATO persistence — attacker re-points webhooks to their own server.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `webhook_subscription.updated` with target host outside allowlist.
